table.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: The logical name of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Information about the use of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Minimum and Maximum # of times the element can appear in the instance

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px; width: 100px

a.title: Reference to the type of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1.png)

a.title: Tumor stage of the DHIS2 Cancer Registry tracker program. This repeatable stage is the central component capturing all key clinical and epidemiological information related to an individual cancer case.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: Tumor

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
CR - Address
Binding: CR - Address value set (required)

tr.td: CR - Checks: Rare Topography Behaviour

tr.td:
CR - Previous tumor number
Binding: CR - Tumor number value set (required)

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck00.png)

vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: CR - Patient ID

description.value: Tumor stage of the DHIS2 Cancer Registry tracker program. This repeatable stage is the central component capturing all key clinical and epidemiological information related to an individual cancer case.

comment.value: Maps the DHIS2 Cancer Registry Tumor stage event to a CRTumorEncounter. Individual data elements become Observations referencing this encounter.
Maps the CR - Topography data element to a CRTopographyObservation.
Maps the CR - Morphology data element to a CRMorphologyObservation.
Maps the CR - Behaviour data element to a CRBehaviourObservation.
Maps the CR - Grade data element to a CRGradeObservation (LOINC 33732-9).

name.value: Mapping: Tumor crBasisDiagnosis → Basis of Diagnosis Observation

comment.value: Maps the CR - Basis diagnosis data element to a CRBasisOfDiagnosisObservation.
Maps the CR - Site data element to a CRSiteObservation.

name.value: Mapping: Tumor crIncidenceDate → Incidence Date Observation

comment.value: Maps the CR - Incidence date data element to a CRIncidenceDateObservation.

name.value: Mapping: Tumor crAge → Age at Incidence Observation

comment.value: Maps the CR - Age data element to a CRAgeAtIncidenceObservation.
Maps the CR - Address data element to a CRAddressObservation.

name.value: Mapping: Tumor crTumorNumber → Tumor Number Observation

comment.value: Maps the CR - Tumor number data element to a CRTumorNumberObservation.

definition.value: Tumor stage of the DHIS2 Cancer Registry tracker program. This repeatable stage is the central component capturing all key clinical and epidemiological information related to an individual cancer case.

short.value: CR - Checks: Rare Age Topography Morphology

definition.value: CR - Checks: Rare Age Topography Morphology

short.value: CR - Checks: Multiple primary test result

definition.value: CR - Checks: Multiple primary test result

short.value: CR - Present in the MUST list

definition.value: CR - Present in the MUST list

short.value: CR - Present in the MUST-NOT list

definition.value: CR - Present in the MUST-NOT list

Tumor stage of the DHIS2 Cancer Registry tracker program. This repeatable stage is the central component capturing all key clinical and epidemiological information related to an individual cancer case.

short.value: CR - Checks: Rare Age Topography Morphology

definition.value: CR - Checks: Rare Age Topography Morphology

short.value: CR - Checks: Multiple primary test result

definition.value: CR - Checks: Multiple primary test result

short.value: CR - Present in the MUST list

definition.value: CR - Present in the MUST list

short.value: CR - Present in the MUST-NOT list

definition.value: CR - Present in the MUST-NOT list
